{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322201141B51BF26998447F0DEC29\"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7615793316733174553","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"那本女频的，《美食世界的奇妙冒险》风中朱鹤的，那个作者好有毅力更了一百多天，但在读人数不足，评分都没有，我只看了两章就没看了[笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773196337,"group_id":"7601701618643373080","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1444087502484425"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601701618643373080","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7682,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7615798394448560921","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，满足我对死后一切去这个世界的幻想，有一个女频文也是这类设定，但没这本好，那本看了几章就弃了，对美食的描写很淡，穿插各种人心惶惶，这本要治愈的多，完成任务的后续剧情都有安排，没看到什么不太好的，就像黑暗的世界开了星星点点的花🌺，，一个穿越者副主角♂，一个系统拥有者主角♂，日常生活中完全磕不起来是那种很友爱的兄弟情，有一种沉浸在惬意温柔的泡泡浴中的感jio。加油作者继续保持哦，真的很棒，最近厌食，看这个就饱了[雀食神作][我也强推][注意]","text_exts":[{"e":161,"s":158,"text":"兄弟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741815027F0DEC29%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615798394448560921%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227601701618643373080%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773195531,"group_id":"7601701618643373080","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"🈚","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5sJcEluotr6gayZURWMTc4oChhzQQbg1qIqWKYpH+DP","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3d34b624564d45d0b4aa06b676985034~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776709203\u0026x-signature=awtFKZyr9NiSW1GfEhqMPnPlrA8%3D","user_id":"1444087502484425","user_name":"万万亿层陨石奶酪什锦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1444087502484425","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601701618643373080","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+种田+美食+摆摊】江望穿到了一个遍地美食的世界，天上飘着舒芙蕾和蒸蛋糕，后山的蘑菇竟然是朱古力，树上结的果子装满了不同的炒菜，火山中喷发出各类糖果，还有会在烹饪中自己排油的鸭子，这鸭子，用来做北京烤鸭简直不要太好吃，由帝王蟹蟹肉组成身体的深海鱼类，喷出巧克力酱的章鱼，这是什么异世界，好爽！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/58a1490656eba28c82fa068a3f235d21~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"有一张嘴","author_id":"","book_id":"7601701618643373080","book_name":"穿越美食世界，白天冒险晚上摆摊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#603010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6020人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1141,\"name\":\"西方奇幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141\u0026name=西方奇幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name= :20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大我超级喜欢你，希望多多更新，一开始看到没有评分字数还很少的时候，我真的打算放弃了因为找了一天文，还全部都是代入不进去文笔也不好的水文或者是题材我不感兴趣的那些文看的我整个人都很烦躁，不过幸好遇到了作者大大你的文，写的超级好，我会一直支持你的加油(ง•̀_•́)ง送作者大大一个五星好评"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773503486,"group_id":"7601701618643373080","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Ca3FwZGyq32ZDC+/fMQa8viqd7CvqpOI0RxCelvsK3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/95335451e8ad48d48e06f85604a3aa14~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706860\u0026x-signature=BDkR6LbnTXT24EtMeFJp8hdUQd0%3D","user_id":"1198901336740493","user_name":"甜甜迪崽："},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1198901336740493","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601701618643373080","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+种田+美食+摆摊】江望穿到了一个遍地美食的世界，天上飘着舒芙蕾和蒸蛋糕，后山的蘑菇竟然是朱古力，树上结的果子装满了不同的炒菜，火山中喷发出各类糖果，还有会在烹饪中自己排油的鸭子，这鸭子，用来做北京烤鸭简直不要太好吃，由帝王蟹蟹肉组成身体的深海鱼类，喷出巧克力酱的章鱼，这是什么异世界，好爽！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/58a1490656eba28c82fa068a3f235d21~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"有一张嘴","author_id":"","book_id":"7601701618643373080","book_name":"穿越美食世界，白天冒险晚上摆摊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#603010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6020人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1141,\"name\":\"西方奇幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141\u0026name=西方奇幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,
